unknowns_noted: top dim chain sum 14880 (1950+3600+1889+1891+3600+1950), 120mm short of 15000 — transcribed verbatim; rounding likely
bottom dim chain parsed as 2190+1200+360+360+1200+2190 per half = 7500mm×2 = 15000; the '360|360' double-pier reads are slightly ambiguous due to small text size
interior partition x positions for bottom zone (3.75, 7.50, 11.25) estimated from visually equal 4-office layout and bottom dim chain; exact tick not fully readable
corridor partition drawn lines appear at y≈3.0 and y≈5.0 (same as floor 1); the 400mm annotation is partition wall thickness per left dim chain
window z (sill/head heights) unknown from plan alone — taken from elevation views in phase 2
east wall window position on 2f (S17) assumed same corridor span as 1f from right dim chain

healed door opening on north corridor partition (S5): one swing arc visible into left conference room; EP wall continuous
healed door openings on south corridor partition (S6): four swing arcs into four bottom offices; EP wall continuous
excluded furniture in top conference rooms: two large oval conference tables with ~10 chairs each
excluded furniture in bottom offices: 4 desk+computer monitor sets with chair symbols
excluded green dimension ticks and extension lines (annotation geometry, not structural)
